notes: Wiki page is redirect-only. No infobox. No existing graph node.

Type assigned place.region — the Known World is a geographic scope concept, not a specific location. Alternative framing as concept.culture is weaker; place.region is the best fit in the current taxonomy.

Edge vocab gap: REGION_OF is defined as Location → Region; using it inversely here (sub-regions are REGION_OF the known world) is semantically reversed. No "CONTAINS" edge type exists. Flag for review — no clean mapping available in 22-type vocab.
